records.question: Who in district New York 6 named John Cochrane is a member of the Democratic party and is at least 46 years old?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.district = 'New York 6' AND people.age >= 46 AND people.party = 'Democratic' AND people.name = 'John Cochrane'
records.pred_sql: SELECT People_ID FROM people WHERE District = 'New York 6' AND Name = 'John Cochrane' AND Party = 'Democratic' AND Age >= 46
